message:
feat(dashboard): add host metrics display in fleet view

Add real-time host system metrics (CPU, memory, network, disk I/O)
to the fleet dashboard. The daemon polls metrics every 5 seconds
using the HostMetricsCollector and broadcasts them via WebSocket
to all connected clients.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
